links.label: Big Cypress National Preserve Closure Order

data.evacuation_notes: A closure is in effect for all areas north of I-75, west of Bundschu Grade, south of Big Cypress boundary line, and east of SR29. This includes the Bear Island, Gator Head, and Pink Jeep Campgrounds. See a map at this link.
